title: DeepSeek Chat Model not returning all outputs
symptom: The Information Extractor is breaking the extraction into multiple runs but only returning the output from one run, resulting in incomplete data.
not_this_if: Output is correct for shorter emails
Using a different model for extraction
root_cause: The DeepSeek Chat Model has a limit on the number of output tokens it can generate. When processing long inputs, it may not be configured to return enough tokens, leading to incomplete results.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the DeepSeek Chat Model node
agent_instruction: Increase the output tokens in the DeepSeek Chat Model settings.
